title: Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
summary: OpenAI developed GPT-Red, an LLM designed to act as a "super-hacker" for adversarial testing of other models against cyberattacks. The company trained its flagship GPT-5.6 against GPT-Red to create its most robust release to date. This red-teaming approach demonstrates how adversarial LLMs can strengthen AI security defenses.
content: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company released the latest version of its flagship LLM, GPT-5.6. OpenAI says that training it against GPT-Red made the model its most robust release yet. GPT-Red automates…

zh.title: 认识 GPT-Red：OpenAI 为让其模型更安全而构建的 LLM 超级黑客
zh.summary: OpenAI 开发了 GPT-Red，一个被设计用作"超级黑客"的 LLM，用于对其他模型进行对抗性测试以防御网络攻击。该公司用 GPT-Red 对其旗舰产品 GPT-5.6 进行训练，创造了迄今为止最强大的版本。这种红队测试方法展示了对抗性 LLM 如何能够加强 AI 安全防御。

title: The Download: a useful quantum machine and a record-breaking subsea tunnel
summary: PsiQuantum is developing a massive quantum computer using light-based technology. The article highlights both this quantum advancement and a record-breaking subsea tunnel project. These breakthroughs demonstrate significant progress in two distinct areas of infrastructure and computing technology.
content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data…

zh.title: 下载：有用的量子机器和创纪录的海底隧道
zh.summary: PsiQuantum正在开发一台使用光学技术的大规模量子计算机。该文章强调了这一量子进步和创纪录的海底隧道项目。这些突破表明在基础设施和计算技术两个不同领域都取得了重大进展。
